channel.title: DeviceMark — On-Device LLM Leaderboard changelog
channel.description: Board updates: new models, new device measurements, methodology changes.

item.title: v0 launch — 8 entries, full battery, device-measured
item.description: 8 entries (7 vendors + Apple's built-in Foundation Model), full 596-item battery, 95% CIs, 7/8 rows device-measured on iPhone 17 Pro. Findings: five-way statistical tie at the top; Google's official QAT int4 at parity on MMLU-Pro/MATH; quantization loss not monotone with size. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/devicemark/results

item.title: Per-model badges
item.description: Embeddable per-row badges at /badge/<slug>.svg — intelligence composite + device tok/s, regenerated on every deploy.
